Court-Admissible Co-Parenting Communication

Your messages are evidence.
Treat them that way.

Liaison.legal gives you a secure, timestamped record of every co-parenting communication — automatically hashed, permanently logged, and ready for court. Free for parents, forever.

✓ Free forever for parents 🔒 SHA-256 message hashing ✓ No credit card required
JM

Case #2024-1847

Jordan Mercer

VERIFIED

I need to pick up Emma at 5pm. The order says 4pm.

✓ Read 9:14 AM

The court order clearly states 4:00 PM at the school entrance.

Sent 9:16 AM

I won't be able to make it by 4. Traffic.

✓ Read 9:17 AM

This message is being recorded per our court order.

Sent 9:18 AM

✓

SHA-256: a3f9e2c1… · Immutable ledger

Built for court, used every day

Everything you need to protect yourself

🔗

Immutable message ledger

Every message is cryptographically hashed with SHA-256 and chained to the previous record. No edits. No deletions. Ever.

👁️

Read & open confirmation

Exact timestamps when messages are received and read — eliminating "I never saw that" as a defense in court.

🔒

End-to-end encrypted

Zero-knowledge architecture means only you and your co-parent can read messages. Not even Liaison.legal has access.

📋

Complete communication history

Chronological, searchable, cryptographically verified record of every message exchanged — ready for court at any time.

📁

Document storage

Upload and securely store court orders, parenting plans, school records, and any other case-relevant documents.

⚖️

Attorney-ready from day one

Your attorney gets direct access to the verified evidence ledger — no time spent organizing screenshots or printouts.

How we compare

Not all co-parenting apps are equal

Feature

TalkingParents OurFamilyWizard

Immutable audit chain (prev-hash linking) ✓ — —
Document storage ✓ ✓ ✓
Attorney access to evidence ledger ✓ Paid upgrade Paid upgrade
AI forensic audit against court order Via attorney — —
Zero-knowledge encryption ✓ — —

Pricing and features based on publicly available information. Always verify current pricing directly with each provider.
